meta.dialoguePolicy: Original generated dialogue. Does not copy OSRS quest dialogue.

numericNpcIds.note: gameNpcIds can contain multiple OSRS cache IDs when a name has variants. Use primaryGameNpcId only when your server expects one default id; use npc-id-index.json for exact server-id lookups.
